chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of Grandfathers and Grandmothers

text: 5639 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ أُذَيْنَةَ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ وَ بُكَيْرٍ وَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ وَ اَلْفُضَيْلِ وَ بُرَيْدِ بْنِ مُعَاوِيَةَ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ : "أَنَّ اَلْجَدَّ مَعَ اَلْإِخْوَةِ مِنَ اَلْأَبِ مِثْلُ وَاحِدٍ مِنَ اَلْإِخْوَةِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5639 - Ibn Udhaynah narrated from Zurarah, Bukayr, Muhammad ibn Muslim, Al-Fuḍayl, and Burayd ibn Muawiyah from one of the two Imams (peace be upon them) who said:
"The grandfather, when inheriting alongside the paternal siblings, is considered as one of the brothers."
